untranslatable_reason: Signal defines volume momentum and percentage change calculations but provides no actionable entry/exit conditions (both marked AUTHOR_SILENT). The formula itself (Volume_t - Volume_(t-n)) / Volume_(t-n) cannot be directly expressed using allowed indicators. While vol_ratio_20 exists, it measures a different metric (ratio vs percentage change). No thresholds or direction are specified, making this a definition rather than a tradeable rule.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_12 is a volume momentum definition signal. Entry conditions show the mathematical formulas but lack comparison operators or thresholds. Exit conditions are silent. Parameters (observation_period, momentum_threshold, percentage_threshold) are all author-silent. To make this translatable, the signal would need: (1) specific threshold values for momentum_threshold and percentage_threshold, (2) comparison operators (>, <, >=, <=), and (3) defined exit logic. The available vol_ratio_20 indicator does not match the requested percentage change calculation.
